name: atlas-dropoff
description: Atlas Drop-off: see onboarding and funnel drop-off painted on your app's real screens, powered by your Revyl Atlas map and PostHog events.

plugins.name: atlas-dropoff
plugins.description: Skill that integrates the @revyl/atlas-analytics SDK, builds a screen-map against the Revyl Atlas graph, and generates the atlas-report drop-off report.
